items.name: Subscription tiers
items.tactic: Basic $9/mo, Pro $29/mo, Enterprise custom. Clear upgrade path.

items.name: Billing automation
items.tactic: Stripe webhooks. Invoice on billing_date. Auto-retry 3x. Notify on success.

items.name: Dunning workflow
items.tactic: Failed: retry 3d. Email+incentive. Suspend account. Recover 40% via dunning.

items.name: Churn prevention
items.tactic: Usage down 30% = outreach. NPS <40 = intervention. Offer pause.

items.name: MRR/LTV metrics
items.tactic: MRR = active * price. LTV = MRR / monthly_churn. Track health.
